heading: Appropriations for administrative expense
label: 1783 Appropriations for administrative expense
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated for any fiscal year such sums as may be necessary to the Secretary for the Secretary’s administrative expense under this chapter.
notes: Amendments1989— inserted “Appropriations for administrative expense” as section catchline and substituted “are hereby” for “is hereby” and “the Secretary’s” for “his”.Pub. L. 101–147
amendments: Amendments1989— inserted “Appropriations for administrative expense” as section catchline and substituted “are hereby” for “is hereby” and “the Secretary’s” for “his”.Pub. L. 101–147
